## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Kaptio and growthx.ai for content strategy and marketing solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Kaptio faces challenges with a complex, lengthy sales cycle (6-9 months) for their high-value travel industry software](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [growthx.ai offers comprehensive content strategy and production services to boost organic traffic, brand awareness, and sales enablement](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Proposed solution: Editorial program producing 50,000 words/month of targeted content, starting potentially in early May](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [Next steps include reviewing a proposal and internal discussions at Kaptio](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)

## Topics

### Kaptio's Current Situation

  - [B2B SaaS for multi-day travel industry (e.g., Intrepid, Rocky Mountaineer)](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Average deal size: £400k ARR, £600k-£1M implementation](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Target market: Mid to large travel companies, aspiring to enterprise level](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Key decision makers: CTOs, CIOs, technology directors](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Complex, slow sales cycle (6-9 months average)](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [High-value product requiring significant investment](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
      - [Need to build brand awareness and authority in the space](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

### growthx.ai's Offering

  - [Comprehensive content strategy and production service](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Team includes former leaders from TripAdvisor, Nerd Wallet, TechCrunch](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [12-week intensive process to develop and execute content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows for efficiency and scale](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Pricing: Editorial program recommended, \~10 cents per word](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [Deliverables:](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [50,000 words/month of targeted content](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
      - [Weekly website audits](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
      - [Content staging and image creation](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
      - [Full A-to-Z content management](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Focus on understanding audience, their jobs-to-be-done, and pain points](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Develop authority in the space through high-quality, relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Optimize for both traditional search and AI-powered results (30-40% of referrals)](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Examples of success: Ramp (fintech), enterprise security companies](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

### Potential Benefits for Kaptio

  - [Increased organic traffic and brand awareness](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Better positioning as an authority in the travel tech space](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Support for complex sales process through educational content](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Potential to shorten sales cycles by addressing pain points earlier](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)

## Next Steps

  - [growthx.ai to send detailed proposal to Tracy](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1878.0)
  - [Tracy to review proposal with Lindsay and discuss internally](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
  - [Potential kick-off in early May if Kaptio decides to proceed](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Further questions can be addressed via Slack or follow-up call if needed](https://fathom.video/share/zyMDCcsT2Kbv_CvyutAcXAtUKrBb-odn?tab=summary&timestamp=1889.0)
